description: Orange S.A. — France — Royalty — baseline CONFIRMED
legal_notes: Real operating entity, strong substance. Art. 12(2) PL-FR DTC (1975) rate is 10%. MLI PPT applies (France post-ratif notifications 2020 & 2024) but entity passes all three BO conditions. Data file data/orange_polska_royalty.json used as source.

input.substance_notes: Major multinational telecom operator headquartered in Paris. 137,000 employees. Owns and actively manages IP portfolio in France; dedicated R&D division. Full DEMPE functions performed in-country. Art. 4a pkt 29 CIT Act: all three BO conditions met.
